scripts.dist:mac: npm run generate:icons && npm run stage:runtime && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run generate:icons && npm run stage:runtime && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:win:dir: npm run generate:icons && npm run stage:runtime && electron-builder --win dir
scripts.dist: npm run generate:icons && npm run stage:runtime && electron-builder
scripts.dist:dir: npm run generate:icons && npm run stage:runtime && electron-builder --dir
